violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Candy chute at McFlurry station had dried food residue at bottom surfaces. *Corrected on-site. -Pink debris at back edges of ice chutes at public soda dispenser.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towels out at hand sink next to fryers. -COS-Stocked immediately.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
